author: j4charlie
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A note-focused Codex agent for Obsidian, deeply integrated with Codex CLI.

manifest.author: j4charlie
manifest.description: Run Codex CLI as a local AI agent with note context, approvals, and reviewable file changes.
manifest.name: Codex AI Agent

name: Codex AI Agent

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Fixed the change review entry so Codex file edits remain reviewable after a run completes, including non-Git review-only workflows.
- Improved the live diff review button to reuse the latest session diff when there is no active running process.
- Preserved review state so fully accepted or rejected diffs no longer keep stale review prompts visible.
- Localized inline edit review controls and Git workspace prompts for cleaner English/Chinese UI behavior.
- Made inline edit quick commands respect the selected conversation mode.

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Added inline editing for selected Markdown content, including quick commands, current/new conversation targeting, and review/apply controls.
- Improved Obsidian Markdown table selection mapping so rendered table selections resolve back to the correct source row and column range.
- Hardened table edit validation for selected cells, full rows, and full columns, including safe handling for clearing or deleting table content without touching cells outside the selected range.
- Added Chinese and English localization for the new inline-edit popover, buttons, quick-command controls, settings, and status text.
- Updated the Change Review / Git Workspace drawer so it behaves properly in light themes.
- Renamed file-tree context menu actions to “Add file to Codex conversation” and “Add folder to Codex conversation”.

## Tiny Table Rant

Supporting Obsidian Markdown tables was much harder than it looks: rendered table cells, CodeMirror source ranges, browser selections, Markdown pipes, and user intent all have to line up. It works now, but wow, tables really made us earn it.

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
这版主要改善了多标签使用和设置体验：

- 设置页增加了中英文切换，中文用户看配置项会更直观。
- 切换不同 Agent 标签时，输入框里的草稿和已附加的上下文会保留下来，不容易误丢。
- 多个 Agent 标签同时运行时，状态会分开记录，减少互相覆盖或显示错位的情况。
- 正在运行的 Agent 标签会有更明显的动态提示，方便一眼看出哪个任务还在处理。
- 调整了一些对话状态和界面细节，让标签切换、取消任务、恢复历史时更稳定。

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
This version mainly enhances the confirmation and organization process after the Agent helps you modify content:

- You can now see more clearly what changes the Agent has made, and confirm them step by step by file and by paragraph.
- Pending changes are also directly visible in the main editing area, so you can handle them without switching back and forth between views.
- A more complete Git management entry has been added, making it easier to organize, commit, and view history of confirmed changes.
- The plugin’s own session and settings data are now stored in a more independent location, making future cleanup and migration clearer.
- Some interface details have been adjusted to make change review, status indicators, and display under the light theme more stable.

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
Improve Agent message timeline.

Changes:
- Render user context chips inline in message history
- Add copy buttons for user and assistant messages
- Improve running/processed status timeline behavior
- Reduce noisy tool rows for reasoning and file-change events
- Refresh Skills discovery when opening the picker and include plugin-local skill roots

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
Restore runtime configuration behavior.

Changes:
- Restore external Skills discovery from local skill directories
- Restore Node.js path setting and PATH injection for Codex subprocesses
- Restore CODEX_BIN environment override
- Keep CSS lint cleanup and repository hygiene improvements from earlier releases

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
Reduce Obsidian community review warnings.

Changes:
- Remove direct filesystem and OS identity access from plugin runtime code
- Stop scanning local external Skills directories; use bundled Skills only
- Avoid process environment reads when launching Codex
- Add CONTRIBUTING.md for repository hygiene
- Keep shell execution only for the explicit local Codex CLI integration

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
CSS lint cleanup for Obsidian community review.

Changes:
- Remove unsupported extended system font fallback usage from stylesheet font stacks
- Avoid CSS features flagged by Obsidian lint where straightforward
- Remove unnecessary !important declarations from plugin styles

releases.author: j4charlie
releases.description:
Initial public release for Obsidian community plugin submission.

Includes:
- Sidebar Codex Agent panel for Obsidian desktop
- Ask and Agent modes
- Explicit note, selection, file, and folder context attachments
- Streaming responses, tool activity, approval cards, local history, and reviewable diffs
